converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Sigma Delta Epsilon records
Sigma Delta Epsilon
3605
9.2 cubic feet. 9.2 cubic feet.
1920-2012. Includes correspondence, bulletins, membership lists, reports, minutes, financial records, questionnaires, records of conventions, and histories, newsletters, and related records, as well as tape recordings. Includes correspondence, bulletins, membership lists, reports, minutes, financial records, questionnaires, records of conventions, and histories of Sigma Delta Epsilon and its chapters, newsletters, and related records. Also, tape recordings of Grand Chapter meeting, National Council meeting, and 65th Anniversary speeches, 1986. Collection material in English 2068337
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
N. Dean
Date completed:
January 1987
EAD encoding:
Daniel J. Keeley, September 2002
Date modified:
Jude Corina, August 2012
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Sigma Delta Epsilon is a sorority for graduate women in science.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, bulletins, membership lists, reports, minutes, financial records, questionnaires, records of conventions, and histories of Sigma Delta Epsilon and its chapters, newsletters, and related records. Also, tape recordings of Grand Chapter meeting, National Council meeting, and 65th Anniversary speeches, 1986.
Charter for the establishment of a chapter at Iowa State College, 1925.
Proclamations for "Women in Science Week," from the Governor of Massachusetts and the Mayor of Boston, June 7-13, 2004.
SERIES LIST
Series I. National Council, Minutes and Correspondence Box 1
Series II. Reports to National Council Box 2
Series III. Folders on Deceased or Honorary Members, National Newsletters, National Membership Rosters, Minutes of National Meetings Box 3
Series IV. Histories of Individual Chapters, Minutes of National Meetings Box 4
Series V. Current and Historical Material Box 45
Series VI. Copies of Publications, Bulletins and Newsletters Box 6-9
Series VII. Chapter Meetings Box 10
Series VIII. Items Added October 1, 1987 Box 10
Series IX. Items Added November 21, 1992 Box 10
Series X. Items Added Box 12
Series VI. Cassette Tapes Box 13
Cite As:
Sigma Delta Epsilon records, #3605. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Women in science. Women -- Societies and clubs. Graduate Women in Science

No. 1Fall 20118Vol. 73, No. 2Winter 2011-20128Vol. 73, No. 3Spring/Summer 20128Newsletters
Scope and Contents
From the summer of 1969 (Vol. 1) through 1979 (Vol. IX) Newsletters were published in addition to Bulletins. Purpose of Newsletters as to fill a communication gap between spring and fall publications. However, this schedule was changed during those years.
When Helen Haller became Editor, she incorporated the numbering system into the Bulletin numberings.Vol. I: No.119698Vol. II: No.119708Vol. II: No. 2(October) 19708Vol. II: No.3 April19718Vol. III: No.2 (No.1 missing)(October) 19718Vol. IV: No.1(February) 19728Vol. IV: No.2(September) 19728Vol. V: No.1(March) 19738Vol. V: No.2(September) 19738Vol. VI: No.1(January) 19748Vol. VII: No.1(September) 19758Vol. VIII: No.2(February) 19768Vol. VIII: No.2(February) 19778Vol. IX: No.1(Spring) 19798Vol. IX: No.2(Summer) 19798Series VII. Chapter MeetingsKits from Grand Chapter Meetings 1970-1986June, 1970 Madison, WisconsinJune19709June, 1971 Ithaca, New York; December - PhiladelphiaJune19719June, 1972 Columbus, Ohio December - WashingtonJune19729June, 1973 Lincoln, NebraskaJune19739June, 1974 Leavenworth, Kansas; February - San FranciscoJune19749June, 1975 College Park , Maryland; January - New York CityJune19759June, 1976 Champaign, Illinois; February - BostonJune19769June, 1977 Madison, Wisconsin; February - DenverJune19779June, 1978 San Diego, CaliforniaJune19789June, 1979 Philadelphia, PennsylvaniaJune19799June, 1980 Arlington, Virginia; January - San Francisco (Minutes only)June19809June, 1981 Ithaca, New York; January - Toronto (Minutes only)June19819June, 1982 St. Paul, Minneapolis; January - Washington (Minutes only)June19829May, 1983 Detroit, MichiganMay19839May, 1984 New York, New York (Placed in archives January 18, 1985)May19849May, 1985 Los Angeles, California (Included in archives 'current' 1987)May19859May, 1986 Madison, Wisconsin (Included in archives 'current' 1987)May19869Grand Chapter Meeting reports prior to 1970
Scope and Contents
These are not in separate kits by years. The reports are usually brief and have been filed in groups in folders1948 Reports from officers and committees-- apparently no meeting held.1948121949 No National Convention--conducted by mail1949121950 New York City1950121951 Philadelphia1951121952 Ithaca, New York1952121953 Madison, Wisconsin1953121954 Gainesville, Florida1954121955 Minneapolis1955121956 New York City1956121957 Indianapolis1957121958 Washington1958121959 Missing1959121960 New York City (December)1960121961 Purdue University (August)1961121962 Missing1962121963 Cleveland (December)1963121964 Montreal (December)1964121965 Berkeley (December)1965121966 Washington, D.C. (December)1966121967 Missing1967121968 Dallas (December)1968121969 Boston (December)196912Series VIII. Items Added October 1, 1987
Scope and Contents
The following items were deposited in the Cornell University Library Archives by the National Organization of Sigma Delta Epsilon, Graduate Women in Science.Minutes of National Council Meeting and Grand Chapter Meeting24-25 1986

Sigma Delta Epsilon: Graduate Women in Science website [Delivery] ======= Series I. National Council, Minutes and Correspondence"Personnel - National Council" Lists of national officers1935/1936 - 1967/196311"Personnel of National Committees" Lists of national committees and committee member1962-196312"SDE 1968 National Council Grand Chapter Membership Roster" Reports, list of members by chapter196313"SDE 1968 Grand Chapter Meeting Membership Roster" Reports, lists of members by chapter196814"1968 National Meetings" Includes 3 smaller folders. "SDE 1968 National Council Grand Chapter Membership Roster" Reports, lists of members by chapter 1968; "Sigma Delta Epsilon" Report by auditor 1967/1968 ; Untitled folder containing reports, questionnaires, correspondence, lists of members in 1968. No. 1Fall 20118Vol. 73, No. 2Winter 2011-20128Vol. 73, No. 3Spring/Summer 20128Newsletters
Scope and Contents
From the summer of 1969 (Vol. 1) through 1979 (Vol. IX) Newsletters were published in addition to Bulletins. Purpose of Newsletters as to fill a communication gap between spring and fall publications. However, this schedule was changed during those years.
When Helen Haller became Editor, she incorporated the numbering system into the Bulletin numberings.Vol. I: No.119698Vol. II: No.119708Vol. II: No. 2(October) 19708Vol. II: No.3 April19718Vol. III: No.2 (No.1 missing)(October) 19718Vol. IV: No.1(February) 19728Vol. IV: No.2(September) 19728Vol. V: No.1(March) 19738Vol. V: No.2(September) 19738Vol. VI: No.1(January) 19748Vol. VII: No.1(September) 19758Vol. VIII: No.2(February) 19768Vol. VIII: No.2(February) 19778Vol. IX: No.1(Spring) 19798Vol. IX: No.2(Summer) 19798Series VII. Chapter MeetingsKits from Grand Chapter Meetings 1970-1986June, 1970 Madison, WisconsinJune19709June, 1971 Ithaca, New York; December - PhiladelphiaJune19719June, 1972 Columbus, Ohio December - WashingtonJune19729June, 1973 Lincoln, NebraskaJune19739June, 1974 Leavenworth, Kansas; February - San FranciscoJune19749June, 1975 College Park , Maryland; January - New York CityJune19759June, 1976 Champaign, Illinois; February - BostonJune19769June, 1977 Madison, Wisconsin; February - DenverJune19779June, 1978 San Diego, CaliforniaJune19789June, 1979 Philadelphia, PennsylvaniaJune19799June, 1980 Arlington, Virginia; January - San Francisco (Minutes only)June19809June, 1981 Ithaca, New York; January - Toronto (Minutes only)June19819June, 1982 St. Paul, Minneapolis; January - Washington (Minutes only)June19829May, 1983 Detroit, MichiganMay19839May, 1984 New York, New York (Placed in archives January 18, 1985)May19849May, 1985 Los Angeles, California (Included in archives 'current' 1987)May19859May, 1986 Madison, Wisconsin (Included in archives 'current' 1987)May19869Grand Chapter Meeting reports prior to 1970
Scope and Contents
These are not in separate kits by years. The reports are usually brief and have been filed in groups in folders1948 Reports from officers and committees-- apparently no meeting held.1948121949 No National Convention--conducted by mail1949121950 New York City1950121951 Philadelphia1951121952 Ithaca, New York1952121953 Madison, Wisconsin1953121954 Gainesville, Florida1954121955 Minneapolis1955121956 New York City1956121957 Indianapolis1957121958 Washington1958121959 Missing1959121960 New York City (December)1960121961 Purdue University (August)1961121962 Missing1962121963 Cleveland (December)1963121964 Montreal (December)1964121965 Berkeley (December)1965121966 Washington, D.C. (December)1966121967 Missing1967121968 Dallas (December)1968121969 Boston (December)196912Series VIII. Items Added October 1, 1987
Scope and Contents
The following items were deposited in the Cornell University Library Archives by the National Organization of Sigma Delta Epsilon, Graduate Women in Science.Minutes of National Council Meeting and Grand Chapter Meeting24-25 1986
Scope and Contents
May 24-25 1986 International House Philadelphia, Penn. Contents are Typed Copies and TapesGrand Chapter Meeting (3 Tapes)10National Council Meeting (2 Tapes)1065th Anniversary Speeches (2 Tapes)10OtherInterim National Council Meeting : February, 16, 1987 Hyatt Regency Hotel Chicago, Ill.February, 16, 19871986 Project Reports From Grant-in-aid Recipients: Gail Foreman, Marilyn Lloyd1986101986 Publication, Brief Report, Final Report: Fellowship Winner, Pamela J. Stewart1986101986 Eloise Gerry Winners and Honorary Mention: Application and Recommendations198610National Honorary Awards 1987 : Applications and Recommendations198710National Honorary Awards 1987 : Recommendations, Vitae, Publications198710
Scope and Contents
Dr. Rita Colwell, Dr. Barbara McClintock, Dr. Theressa Campbell StadtmanKit From Grand Chapter Meeting: June 24-28, 1987 Macalester College St. Paul MinnesotaJune 24-28, 198710Margaret Pittman, Article by Gail McBride "Down to a 40-hour work-week." from Bulletin of Medical Alumni Assoc., Medicine on the Midway, University of Chicago Spring 1987.
